TESTIMONIALS

What Parents Say About Us

Your trust is our greatest achievement. Read real stories from families we've had the privilege to care for.

4.9 out of 5 based on 500+ reviews

FEATURED STORY

A Journey of Hope & Healing

NICU Care
"When our son Aarav was born premature at 32 weeks, we were devastated. Dr. Sanjay Swamy and his NICU team became our pillars of support. For 6 weeks, they monitored Aarav round the clock, explaining every procedure and keeping us informed. Today, Aarav is a healthy, energetic toddler. We can never thank Dr. Swamy enough for giving us our miracle baby. His expertise, patience, and genuine care make him the best pediatrician we've ever met."
Dr. Priya & Arvind Sharma Parents of Aarav (3 years)

PARENT REVIEWS

Stories from Our Families

2 weeks ago

"Dr. Sanjay Swamy is incredibly patient and knowledgeable. He takes the time to explain everything and calms our anxieties. My daughter was terrified of doctors, but Dr. Swamy's gentle approach has completely changed that. Now she actually looks forward to her checkups!"

Priya Sharma Mother of 2-year old
1 month ago

"We visited for our newborn's vaccinations. The experience was smooth, and Dr. Swamy handled our baby with such care. He also patiently answered all our first-time parent questions about feeding, sleep patterns, and developmental milestones."

Rahul & Meera Mehta Parents of newborn
3 weeks ago

"My son had a persistent cough for weeks. Other doctors kept prescribing antibiotics, but Dr. Swamy's diagnosis was spot on - it was allergic bronchitis. He doesn't prescribe unnecessary medicines and believes in treating the root cause."

Anita Desai Mother of 5-year old
1 week ago

"Best pediatrician in Bangalore! When my son had a high fever at 2 AM, Dr. Swamy was available on call and guided us through the night. His dedication is unmatched. Highly professional and approachable at all times."

Vikram Singh Father of 8-year old
2 months ago

"Handling twins is challenging, but Dr. Swamy made our scheduled visits so easy. He remembers both my children's medical history without looking at files! The staff is also very supportive and accommodating with appointment timings."

Sneha Reddy Mother of twins
1 month ago

"Our daughter was born at 34 weeks and spent 3 weeks in NICU under Dr. Swamy's care. His expertise in neonatal care is exceptional. He kept us updated daily and even called to check on her after discharge. Forever grateful!"

Karthik & Divya Nair Parents of premature baby
3 weeks ago

"I was very anxious about vaccinations for my baby. Dr. Swamy explained each vaccine, its importance, and possible side effects. The painless vaccination option was a blessing. My baby barely cried!"

Aishwarya Patel Mother of 6-month old
2 weeks ago

"My son accidentally swallowed a coin. We rushed to the hospital at midnight, and Dr. Swamy was there within 20 minutes. He handled the emergency calmly and professionally. The coin was safely removed. Thank you, Doctor!"

Suresh Kumar Father of 4-year old
1 month ago

"I bring my grandchildren to Dr. Swamy. He treats not just the children but also educates the entire family about child health. His clinic is clean, child-friendly, and the waiting time is minimal. Highly recommend!"

Lakshmi Venkatesh Grandmother
2 weeks ago

"Our newborn had severe jaundice and needed phototherapy. Dr. Swamy's prompt diagnosis and treatment prevented any complications. He also supported my wife with breastfeeding guidance. Excellent doctor!"

Mohammed Irfan Father of newborn
1 week ago

"My daughter needed her school vaccination certificate urgently. Dr. Swamy's team prepared all documentation within a day. They maintain excellent digital records. The online appointment system is also very convenient."

Rekha Krishnamurthy Mother of 7-year old
3 months ago

"During COVID, our son developed breathing difficulty at night. Dr. Swamy arranged immediate video consultation and guided us through nebulization at home. He followed up the next morning. Such dedication is rare to find."

Deepak & Shalini Rao Parents of 3-year old
View All Reviews on Google
